title: PanelContextFragment
description: PanelContextFragment: Fragment containing thermal boundary context, colour, and surface direction properties

IsAir.description: Defines whether the panel is an air panel (e.g. air wall or hole)

IsGround.description: Defines whether the panel is a ground panel

Reversed.description: Defines whether the panel surface direction is reversed

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
